name: Thoughts Renderer

tasks.title: Implement thoughts renderer
tasks.body: Create internal/logrender/thoughts.go. Implement a ThoughtsRenderer struct that accepts an io.Writer. The Render(ctx context.Context, records <-chan Record) method filters for records where Type == 'assistant', extracts the Text field, and writes it to the output writer followed by a newline. All other record types are silently skipped. No formatting is applied: no timestamps, no indentation, no glyphs. Empty text fields are skipped (do not print blank lines for empty assistant records). This renderer works the same for both replay and follow mode since it simply processes records as they arrive. The method returns when records closes or ctx is cancelled.

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Thoughts Renderer is complete and correct

audit_enrichment: Verify that only assistant record text is emitted, with no decoration, timestamps, or blank lines from empty records

breadcrumbs.text: Implemented ThoughtsRenderer in internal/logrender/thoughts.go with full test coverage. Filters assistant records, writes text+newline, skips everything else. Single Render method works for both replay and follow modes.

Audit reviewed 2 files (thoughts.go: 39 lines, thoughts_test.go: 125 lines). PASS. Build, tests (including race detector), and vet all clean. Seven tests cover assistant filtering, empty text skipping, empty channels, mixed record types, context cancellation, and all-empty-assistant edge case. One observation: fmt.Fprintln error is discarded, but this matches the established package pattern in SummaryRenderer and is a pre-existing design choice across the renderer contract, not a regression. No nil safety issues (writer set at construction, no optional fields). No dead code, no duplication (feedRecords helper shared from summary_test.go). Clean, minimal implementation that does exactly what the spec requires.

audit.result_summary: ThoughtsRenderer implemented in internal/logrender/thoughts.go with a single Render method that filters assistant records with non-empty Text from an NDJSON record channel, writing each to an io.Writer with a trailing newline. All other record types are silently skipped. The implementation follows the same structural patterns as SummaryRenderer (constructor, io.Writer field, context-aware select loop) and is covered by seven tests exercising all meaningful edge cases. Audit found no correctness issues, no dead code, no concurrency hazards, and no regressions.

log-command-redesign/log-rendering-engin.objective: Implement the ThoughtsRenderer that extracts and displays raw agent output from NDJSON log records
log-command-redesign/log-rendering-engin.what_happened: Created internal/logrender/thoughts.go with ThoughtsRenderer struct and a single Render method. The renderer filters for type==assistant records with non-empty Text, writes each to the output writer with a trailing newline. Followed the same structural patterns as SummaryRenderer (constructor, io.Writer field, context-aware select loop).
went_well: Clean minimal implementation; seven tests cover all edge cases including context cancellation, empty channels, empty text filtering, and mixed record types
improvements: None identified; the renderer is intentionally minimal per spec
action_items: The interleaved renderer will need to combine elements from both SummaryRenderer and ThoughtsRenderer
